general_notes: A. PAINT DOORS AND DOOR FRAMES TO MATCH ADJACENT PARTITION UNLESS NOTED OTHERWISE.
B. ALL DOOR HARDWARE SHALL BE LEVER TYPE MEETING ACCESSIBILITY DESIGN REQUIREMENTS.
C. COORDINATE ALL HARDWARE KEYING WITH THE OWNER AND OBTAIN OWNER'S APPROVAL PRIOR TO PLACING HARDWARE ORDER.
FROM EXTERIOR - LOCKED CONDITION AFTER HOURS: ATM DOORS: ACCESS VIA VALID CARD WHICH UNLOCKS EXIT DEVICE ON ATM DOORS. CUSTOMERS PULL TRIM FOR [ELECTRICAL] ENTRANCE.
FROM EXTERIOR - UNLOCKED CONDITION DURING BUSINESS HOURS: ATM DOORS: PARABIT CONTROLLER HOLDS DOORS UNLOCKED ON A TIME SCHEDULE. CUSTOMERS PULL TRIM FOR [ELECTRICAL] ENTRANCE.
FROM INTERIOR: ATM DOORS: FREE EGRESS AT ALL TIMES VIA THE INSIDE DUMMY TOUCH BAR OR BY DEPRESSING THE PUSH TO EXIT BUTTON.

SECURE LOCKDOWN FROM INTERIOR DURING BUSINESS HOURS: ATM DOORS: IN THE EVENT OF AN EMERGENCY, BANK ASSOCIATE USES A KEY TO OPERATE THE INTERIOR KEYSWITCH WHICH WILL OVERRIDE THE ACCESS SYSTEM AND SECURE TEH DOOR (RED LED). EGRESS WILL STILL BE ALLOWED. AFTER THE EVENT, ASSOCIATE USES A KEY TO OPERATE THE KEYSWITCH AND THE DOOR WILL RESUME OPERATION UNDER PARABIT CONTROLLER SYSTEM (GREEN LED).

EVACUATION LOCKDOWN FROM EXTERIOR DURING BUSINESS HOURS: ATM DOORS: IN THE EVENT OF AN EMERGENCY, BANK ASSOCIATE TO USE INTERIOR KEYSWITCH WHICH WILL OVERRIDE THE ACCESS SYSTEM AND SECURE THE DOORS (RED LED). EGRESS WILL STILL BE ALLOWED AND ASSOCIATE WILL EXIT THROUGH SINGLE DOOR. AFTER EVENT, ASSOCIATE WILL ENTER THE BANK BY OPERATING THE EXTERIOR KEYSWITCH WHICH UNLOCKS THE DOORS FOR 10 SECONDS. AFTER ENTERING THE BANK, ASSOCIATE TO OPERATE THE INTERIOR KEYSWITCH AND DOORS WILL RESUME OPERATION UNDER PARABIT CONTROLLER SYSTEM (GREEN LED).
PEEP SCOPE WHERE NOTED IN SCHEDULE AND REQUIRED BY CODE
USED WHERE NO WALL AREA IS PROVIDED, INSTALLED ON STOREFRONT MULLION
SPECIFY THIS MODEL IF STATE CODE REQUIRES IT
hardware_preamble:
FROM EXTERIOR - LOCKED CONDITION AFTER HOURS:
ATM DOORS: ACCESS VIA VALID CARD WHICH UNLOCKS EXIT DEVICE ON ATM DOORS. CUSTOMERS PULL TRIM FOR [ELECTRICAL] ENTRANCE.

FROM EXTERIOR - UNLOCKED CONDITION DURING BUSINESS HOURS:
ATM DOORS: PARABIT CONTROLLER HOLDS DOORS UNLOCKED ON A TIME SCHEDULE. CUSTOMERS PULL TRIM FOR [ELECTRICAL] ENTRANCE.

FROM INTERIOR:
ATM DOORS: FREE EGRESS AT ALL TIMES VIA THE INSIDE DUMMY TOUCH BAR OR BY DEPRESSING THE PUSH TO EXIT BUTTON.

SECURE LOCKDOWN FROM INTERIOR DURING BUSINESS HOURS:
ATM DOORS: IN THE EVENT OF AN EMERGENCY, BANK ASSOCIATE USES A KEY TO OPERATE THE INTERIOR KEYSWITCH WHICH WILL OVERRIDE THE ACCESS SYSTEM AND SECURE TEH DOOR (RED LED). EGRESS WILL STILL BE ALLOWED. AFTER THE EVENT, ASSOCIATE USES A KEY TO OPERATE THE KEYSWITCH AND THE DOOR WILL RESUME OPERATION UNDER PARABIT CONTROLLER SYSTEM (GREEN LED).

EVACUATION LOCKDOWN FROM EXTERIOR DURING BUSINESS HOURS:
ATM DOORS: IN THE EVENT OF AN EMERGENCY, BANK ASSOCIATE TO USE INTERIOR KEYSWITCH WHICH WILL OVERRIDE THE ACCESS SYSTEM AND SECURE THE DOORS (RED LED). EGRESS WILL STILL BE ALLOWED AND ASSOCIATE WILL EXIT THROUGH SINGLE DOOR. AFTER EVENT, ASSOCIATE WILL ENTER THE BANK BY OPERATING THE EXTERIOR KEYSWITCH WHICH UNLOCKS THE DOORS FOR 10 SECONDS. AFTER ENTERING THE BANK, ASSOCIATE TO OPERATE THE INTERIOR KEYSWITCH AND DOORS WILL RESUME OPERATION UNDER PARABIT CONTROLLER SYSTEM (GREEN LED).
B. ALL DOOR HARDWARE SHALL BE LEVER TYPE MEETING ACCESSIBILITY DESIGN REQUIREMENTS.
keying_notes: C. COORDINATE ALL HARDWARE KEYING WITH THE OWNER AND OBTAIN OWNER'S APPROVAL PRIOR TO PLACING HARDWARE ORDER.

project_risks.issue: 7 opening(s) have no hardware set assigned in the schedule.
project_risks.recommendation: Issue RFI to confirm hardware set assignments before bidding.

project_risks.issue: 1 hardware set(s) referenced by 12 door(s) have no extracted line items.
project_risks.recommendation: Locate full hardware set definitions; carry as allowance until confirmed.

rfi_log.question: The door schedule does not show a hardware set for: 119, 120, 123, 124A, 124B, 125, 127. Please confirm the intended hardware set for each.
Provide the complete line-item list for hardware set(s): (E).

estimator_notes: Keying notes captured from the drawings (5 line(s)); verify keyway, master structure, cylinder format and key counts.
24 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
5 hardware set(s) identified; 4 have a complete extracted item list.
12 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
8 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
